EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Enum esriCrawlerDataSourceType

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Possible input and output types associated with a data source crawler.

[Guid("9A59517D-13A1-4612-B22A-CF6D01414172")]
public enum esriCrawlerDataSourceType

Fields

esriCrawlerDataSourceTypeCatalogItem = 32

32: Crawler data source is an item from a raster catalog.

esriCrawlerDataSourceTypeCloud = 4096

4096: Crawler data source is cloud storage.

esriCrawlerDataSourceTypeCustom = 32768

32768: Crawler data source is custom.

esriCrawlerDataSourceTypeDatasetName = 64

64: Crawler data source is a dataset name object.

esriCrawlerDataSourceTypeFile = 1

1: Crawler data source is a file.

esriCrawlerDataSourceTypeFolder = 2

2: Crawler data source is a folder.

esriCrawlerDataSourceTypeImageService = 256

256: Crawler data source is an image service.

esriCrawlerDataSourceTypeLasDataset = 1024

1024: Crawler data source is an LAS dataset.

esriCrawlerDataSourceTypeMapService = 8192

8192: Crawler data source is map service.

esriCrawlerDataSourceTypeOverviewItem = 8

8: Crawler data source is an overview item.

esriCrawlerDataSourceTypeRasterDataset = 128

128: Crawler data source is a raster dataset.

esriCrawlerDataSourceTypeRow = 16

16: Crawler data source is a row in a table.

esriCrawlerDataSourceTypeSearchItem = 2048

2048: Crawler data source is a search item.

esriCrawlerDataSourceTypeString = 4

4: Crawler data source is a string.

esriCrawlerDataSourceTypeTerrain = 512

512: Crawler data source is an terrain dataset.

esriCrawlerDataSourceTypeUnknown = 0

0: Crawler data source is unknown.
